name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Sacramento's Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 2617 La Mesa Way offers same-day car title loans to CA residents.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans operates at 2617 La Mesa Way #2621 in Sacramento, CA, a standalone location serving the broader Sacramento area. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM, giving Sacramento residents flexible weekday and weekend hours for their financial needs.

This Sacramento location specializes in car title loans—a quick borrowing option for vehicle owners. The team at Montana Capital can assess your vehicle's value and provide loan offers on the same day. Call 916-297-6095 to discuss your specific situation and get started with an application at this Sacramento branch.

If you're a Sacramento, CA resident facing an urgent cash need and own a car, a title loan from Montana Capital could be an option to explore. Bring your vehicle title, a valid ID, and proof of residency when you visit the La Mesa Way location. The process is designed to be fast and straightforward for local borrowers.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding (one customer received funds within one hour)
No credit check required; accepts applicants with poor credit and past bankruptcies
Free pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no impact to credit score
Borrower keeps vehicle keys and can continue driving while repaying
4.5 Google rating with positive reviews citing fast processing and friendly staff
cons: Title loans carry high APRs typical of secured short-term lending; specific rates not disclosed on website
Vehicle repossession risk if loan is not repaid
Funds delivered as bank checks rather than cash, limiting immediate accessibility for some
Limited to borrowers with vehicle equity; not available to those without a car
Only 59 Google reviews available; limited independent rating data
best_for: Consumers facing urgent financial emergencies with poor or no credit history
Vehicle owners who need fast cash and can reliably repay within the loan term
Borrowers seeking an alternative to payday loans who have significant vehicle equity
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best suited for vehicle owners experiencing genuine financial emergencies who have no access to traditional credit and can reliably repay within a short timeframe. The primary caveat is that title loans carry significantly higher costs than conventional lending; they should be used only as a last resort for immediate needs, as failure to repay risks vehicle repossession and debt escalation.
services: Local pickup of funds at branch locations
Vehicle equity assessment and loan approval based on income and vehicle value
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 2617 La Mesa Way, Sacramento, CA. Fast same-day car title loans for local residents.
